---
title: "Welcome!"
author: "Brandon Lau"
date: "2026-04-09"
lightbox:
  match: auto
  effect: fade
  desc-position: right
  loop: false
  css-class: "my-css-class"
filters:
    - carousel
---
```{=html}
<style>
.index-layout {
  display: flex;
  gap: 2rem;
  align-items: flex-start;
}
.index-text {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
}
.index-carousel {
  flex: 0 0 40%;
  max-width: 40%;
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .index-layout {
    flex-direction: column;
  }
  .index-carousel {
    flex: 1;
    max-width: 100%;
  }
}
</style>
```

::::: {.index-layout}
:::: {.index-text}
# About
Hi, I'm Brandon Lau

I am a 2/4 CS Major at Stevens Institute of Technology. I have a strong interest and background in Linux and Systems Administration, especially in areas such as virtualization and networking, but am also interested in broadening my knowledge. At the moment, I have a strong interest in Kubernetes and Nix.

Otherwise, I am passionate about lifting, both directly in my own training, as well as the concepts surrounding it (ex: how training is structured, excercise selection, mentality)
::::

:::: {.index-carousel}
::: {.carousel}

::: {.carousel-item image="test.jpeg"}
:::


:::
::::
:::::
